mapper.sql: id, data_sources, conditions, create_time, modify_time, conf
mapper.insert:
insert into reader_ddb_dbi
id,
data_sources,
conditions,
create_time,
modify_time,
conf,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{dataSources,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONArrayHandler},
#{conditions,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update reader_ddb_dbi
data_sources = #{dataSources,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONArrayHandler},
conditions = #{conditions,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update reader_ddb_dbi set data_sources = #{dataSources,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONArrayHandler}, conditions = #{conditions,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
